# `api.jobs.payment.create_ach_session`

> `POST /job/{jobDisplayId}/payment/ACHPaymentSession` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.jobs.payment.create_ach_session(job_display_id: int, *, data: ACHSessionRequest | dict) -> ACHSessionResponse
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab jobs payment create_ach_session <job_display_id> [--data ...]
```

``POST /job/{jobDisplayId}/payment/ACHPaymentSession``

## Request body — `ACHSessionRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `returnUrl` | `Optional[str]` | no | Redirect after session |

## Response

Returns `ACHSessionResponse`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `sessionId` | `Optional[str]` | no | ACH session identifier |
